title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
longDescription: Mario, Luigi and Princess Peach embark on an adventure across the galaxy.
shortDescription: Mario, Luigi and Princess Peach embark on an adventure across the galaxy.

title: The Drama
longDescription: An explosive confession throws the wedding of a seemingly perfect couple off the rails as they spiral to confront whether they can truly make it to "I do."
shortDescription: An explosive confession throws the wedding of a seemingly perfect couple off the rails.

title: Michael
longDescription: The story of pop superstar Michael Jackson -- from his extraordinary early days in the Jackson 5 to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fuels a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world.
shortDescription: Michael Jackson's creative ambition fuels a relentless pursuit to become the world's biggest star.

title: Fuze
longDescription: London undergoes a citywide evacuation when an unexploded World War II bomb is unearthed at a busy construction site. Amid the escalating tension and chaos, a daring criminal operation is set in motion -- one that uses the evacuation as a cover for a meticulously planned bank heist. As authorities race against time to contain the crisis, alliances blur and moral boundaries are crossed.
shortDescription: A citywide evacuation gets used as a cover for a meticulously planned bank heist in London.

title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy
longDescription: The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace. Eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she's returned to them. However, what should be a joyful reunion soon turns into a living nightmare as she starts to transform into something truly horrifying.
shortDescription: A journalist's young daughter transforms into something truly horrifying.

title: You, Me & Tuscany
longDescription: Anna impulsively jets off to Tuscany, Italy, to stay at a stranger's villa without permission. Caught inside the house by the man's mother, she convinces the woman that she's his fiancée. That little lie soon becomes a big problem when Anna develops a growing attraction to the stranger's handsome cousin.
shortDescription: A little lie leads to a blossoming romance for an American woman in Tuscany, Italy.

title: Project Hail Mary
longDescription: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory slowly returns, he soon discovers he must solve the riddle behind a mysterious substance that's causing the sun to die out. As details of the mission unravel, he calls on his scientific training and sheer ingenuity -- but he may not have to do it alone.
shortDescription: A science teacher embarks on an otherworldly mission to find out why the sun is dying out.

title: Michael: The IMAX 2D Experience
longDescription: The story of pop superstar Michael Jackson -- from his extraordinary early days in the Jackson 5 to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fuels a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world.
shortDescription: Michael Jackson's creative ambition fuels a relentless pursuit to become the world's biggest star.

title: Exit 8
longDescription: Strange events plague a young man as he searches for the exit in an endless subway tunnel.
shortDescription: Strange events plague a young man as he searches for the exit in an endless subway tunnel.

title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie 3D
longDescription: Mario, Luigi and Princess Peach embark on an adventure across the galaxy.
shortDescription: Mario, Luigi and Princess Peach embark on an adventure across the galaxy.

title: Lorne
longDescription: Lorne Michaels redefines television, culture and comedy as the creator of "Saturday Night Live"; featuring interviews with Tina Fey, Maya Rudolph, John Mulaney, Andy Samberg, Conan O'Brien, Chris Rock and more.
shortDescription: Lorne Michaels redefines television, culture and comedy as the creator of "Saturday Night Live."

title: The Christophers
longDescription: Desperate for an inheritance, two siblings conspire to forge their father's unfinished paintings so they become valuable after his death.
shortDescription: Siblings conspire to forge their dad's unfinished paintings so they become valuable after his death.

title: Salmokji: Whispering Water
longDescription: A film crew updating a road view mapping site visits a remote reservoir where a mysterious figure was spotted. In the deep, dark water, they encounter a terrifying, unknown entity.
shortDescription: A mapping crew at a reservoir encounters a dark entity lurking in the deep water.

title: Hoppers
longDescription: When scientists discover a way to transform human consciousness into robotic animals, Mabel uses the new technology to uncover mysteries of the animal world that are beyond anything she could have ever imagined.
shortDescription: Mabel uncovers mysteries of the animal world when her consciousness gets placed in a robotic beaver.

title: Project Hail Mary: The IMAX 2D Experience
longDescription: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory slowly returns, he soon discovers he must solve the riddle behind a mysterious substance that's causing the sun to die out. As details of the mission unravel, he calls on his scientific training and sheer ingenuity -- but he may not have to do it alone.
shortDescription: A science teacher embarks on an otherworldly mission to find out why the sun is dying out.

title: Mile End Kicks
longDescription: A 24-year-old music critic gets romantically involved with members of an indie band in Montreal.
shortDescription: A 24-year-old music critic gets romantically involved with members of an indie band in Montreal.

title: I Swear
longDescription: John Davidson grows up with Tourette syndrome in the 1980s Scotland. He faces a society that does not understand his condition. He eventually becomes a campaigner to increase public awareness.
shortDescription: John Davidson navigates 1980s Scotland with Tourette syndrome and becomes a campaigner.

title: Little Lorraine
longDescription: Little Lorraine, a North Atlantic seaside town with a population of 60, becomes embroiled in an international cocaine smuggling operation under the noses of multiple governments, distributed in coffins through a network of funeral homes.
shortDescription: A North Atlantic seaside town becomes embroiled in an international cocaine smuggling operation.

title: Dhurandhar: The Revenge
longDescription: Hamza Ali Mazari pursues Major Iqbal to dismantle Pakistan's crime system. As his mission unfolds, his past reveals a transformative history that shaped his relentless drive for justice.
shortDescription: Hamza Ali Mazari targets Major Iqbal to dismantle Pakistan's criminal underworld.

title: Mother Mary
longDescription: Preparing a comeback, the reunion between a pop icon and the legendary stylist she betrayed spirals into a supernatural reckoning.
shortDescription: A pop icon's reunion with the legendary stylist she betrayed spirals into a supernatural reckoning.

title: Busboys
longDescription: A pair of idiot friends believes that if they become waiters, all of their problems will be solved. They aren't entirely wrong, but they aren't entirely right.
shortDescription: A pair of idiot friends believes that if they become waiters, all of their problems will be solved.

title: A Special Memory
longDescription: Sandra and Dindo navigate the shifting tides of memory when an early-onset diagnosis threatens to erase their shared history.
shortDescription: A couple navigates the shifting tides of memory when a diagnosis threatens to erase their history.

title: Ginny Wedss Sunny 2
longDescription: A mismatched pair, with a storyline involving a wrestler and a vibrant girl, combining romance, comedy, and drama.
shortDescription: A mismatched pair, with a storyline involving a wrestler and a vibrant girl.

title: Good Will Hunting
longDescription: Will Hunting (Matt Damon) has a genius-level IQ but chooses to work as a janitor at MIT. When he solves a difficult graduate-level math problem, his talents are discovered by Professor Gerald Lambeau (Stellan Skarsgard), who decides to help the misguided youth reach his potential. When Will is arrested for attacking a police officer, Professor Lambeau makes a deal to get leniency for him if he will get treatment from therapist Sean Maguire (Robin Williams).
shortDescription: A therapist (Robin Williams) counsels a janitor (Matt Damon) with a genius IQ.

title: Nausicaä of the Valley of the Wind
longDescription: A princess learns the truth about a toxic forest and battles an evil ruler's plans to destroy it.
shortDescription: A princess learns the truth about a toxic forest and battles an evil ruler's plans to destroy it.

title: In the Mood for Love
longDescription: In 1962, journalist Chow Mo-wan (Tony Leung Chiu Wai) and his wife move into a Hong Kong apartment, but Chow's spouse is often away on business. Before long, the lonely Chow makes the acquaintance of the alluring Su Li-zhen (Maggie Cheung Man-yuk), whose own significant other also seems preoccupied with work. As the two friends realize their respective partners are cheating on them, they begin to fall for one another; however, neither wants to stoop to the level of the unfaithful spouses.
shortDescription: A man (Tony Leung Chiu Wai) and a woman (Maggie Cheung Man-yuk) learn their spouses are cheating.

title: Nirvanna the Band the Show the Movie
longDescription: Matt and Jay's plan to book a show at the Rivoli goes horribly wrong, resulting in them accidentally traveling back to the year 2008.
shortDescription: Matt and Jay's show booking plan at the Rivoli fails and they accidentally time travel back to 2008.

title: Nausicaä of the Valley of the Wind
longDescription: Far in the future, after an apocalyptic conflict has devastated much of the world's ecosystem, the few surviving humans live in scattered semi-hospitable environments within what has become a "toxic jungle." Young Nausicaä lives in the arid Valley of the Wind and can communicate with the massive insects that populate the dangerous jungle. Under the guidance of the pensive veteran warrior, Lord Yupa, Nausicaä works to bring peace back to the ravaged planet.
shortDescription: A princess learns the truth about a toxic forest and battles an evil ruler's plans to destroy it.

title: The Room
longDescription: A successful banker's (Tommy Wiseau) fiancee (Juliette Danielle) tempts and manipulates his best friend (Greg Sestero).
shortDescription: A banker's (Tommy Wiseau) fiancee (Juliette Danielle) manipulates his best friend (Greg Sestero).

title: Blue Heron
longDescription: A family of six settles into their new home on Vancouver Island as internal dynamics get revealed through the eyes of the youngest child.
shortDescription: A family of six settles into their new home on Vancouver Island.

title: Project Hail Mary in 70mm Film
longDescription: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory slowly returns, he soon discovers he must solve the riddle behind a mysterious substance that's causing the sun to die out. As details of the mission unravel, he calls on his scientific training and sheer ingenuity -- but he may not have to do it alone.
shortDescription: A science teacher embarks on an otherworldly mission to find out why the sun is dying out.

title: Ratatouille
longDescription: Remy (Patton Oswalt), a resident of Paris, appreciates good food and has quite a sophisticated palate. He would love to become a chef so he can create and enjoy culinary masterpieces to his heart's delight. The only problem is, Remy is a rat. When he winds up in the sewer beneath one of Paris' finest restaurants, the rodent gourmet finds himself ideally placed to realize his dream.
shortDescription: A Parisian rat who enjoys fine food lives beneath a famous restaurant and longs to be a great chef.

title: Middle Life
longDescription: Andie saves Ryan from a car wreck, sparking a tumultuous year that might just prove life could be great.
shortDescription: Andie saves Ryan from a car wreck, sparking a tumultuous year that might prove life could be great.

title: Miss Congeniality
longDescription: When a terrorist threatens to bomb the Miss United States pageant, the FBI rushes to find a female agent to go undercover as a contestant. Unfortunately, Gracie is the only female FBI agent who can "look the part" despite her complete lack of refinement and femininity. She prides herself in being "just one of the boys" and is horrified at the idea of becoming a girly girl.
shortDescription: A female agent goes undercover as a contestant in a beauty pageant to catch a terrorist.

title: Elvira, Mistress of the Dark
longDescription: The cult-movie TV hostess (Phil Rubenstein) inherits an old New England house, a poodle and a black-magic cookbook.
shortDescription: Cult-TV hostess (Phil Rubenstein) inherits house, poodle, witch cookbook.

title: Despicable Me 2
longDescription: Now that Gru has forsaken a life of crime to raise Margo, Agnes and Edith, he's trying to figure out how to provide for his new family. As he struggles with his responsibilities as a father, the Anti-Villain League, an organization dedicated to fighting evil, comes calling. The AVL sends Gru on a mission to capture the perpetrator of a spectacular heist, for who would be better than the world's greatest ex-villain to capture the individual who seeks to usurp his power.
shortDescription: Gru and his new partner hunt the perpetrator of a spectacular heist.

title: Vaazha II: Biopic of a Billion Bros
Pallichattambi
longDescription: Karia, a ruthless goon in 1990s Idukki, lives by violence and risky schemes. When his ties to a local boss sour and his plans backfire, he must fight to survive the mess he created.
shortDescription: Set in 90s Idukki, ruffian Karia's schemes backfire, forcing him to fight for survival.

title: Mlle Bottine
longDescription: Philippe, un compositeur d'opéra en panne d'inspiration, se voit forcé d'héberger sa nièce Simone, une orpheline rebelle et excentrique dont la meilleure amie est une moufette ; malgré leurs personnalités diamétralement opposées, Philippe et Simone découvrent rapidement qu'ils pourraient avoir besoin l'un de l'autre plus qu'ils ne l'auraient initialement cru.
shortDescription: Philippe, un compositeur d'opéra, se voit forcé d'héberger sa nièce Simone, une orpheline rebelle.

title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
longDescription: An imposing black structure provides a connection between the past and the future in this enigmatic adaptation of a short story by revered sci-fi author Arthur C. Clarke. When Dr. Dave Bowman (Keir Dullea) and other astronauts are sent on a mysterious mission, their ship's computer system, HAL, begins to display increasingly strange behavior, leading up to a tense showdown between man and machine that results in a mind-bending trek through space and time.
shortDescription: Supercomputer HAL 9000 guides astronauts on a trip to find the origins of humans.

title: How to Train Your Dragon
longDescription: On the rugged isle of Berk, a Viking boy named Hiccup defies centuries of tradition by befriending a dragon named Toothless. However, when an ancient threat emerges that endangers both species, Hiccup's friendship with Toothless becomes the key to forging a new future. Together, they must navigate the delicate path toward peace, soaring beyond the boundaries of their worlds and redefining what it means to be a hero and a leader.
shortDescription: A Viking boy's friendship with a dragon becomes the key to battling an ancient threat.

title: Folichonneries
longDescription: François et Julie, en relation depuis 16 ans et parents de deux enfants, ne parviennent plus à se rejoindre sexuellement. Ils décident d'ouvrir leur couple afin de vivre des expériences folichonnes qui leur permettront d'en apprendre davantage sur eux-mêmes.
shortDescription: François et Julie décident d'ouvrir leur couple afin de vivre des expériences folichonnes.

title: Sympathy for Mr. Vengeance
longDescription: Deaf-mute Ryu (Shin Ha-kyun) has just been fired from his job in a Seoul, South Korea, factory, and the timing couldn't be worse. His sister (Im Ji-eun) is suffering from kidney trouble, and she needs a transplant that Ryu himself can't provide. Ryu and his girlfriend (Rachel Lillian Goldberg) then kidnap the daughter of wealthy tycoon Park (Song Kang-ho) to raise the money, but an unexpected disaster strikes, and Park launches a bloody quest for revenge that leaves many dead and puts Ryu's life in danger.
shortDescription: A man kidnaps the daughter (Han Bo-bae) of his former boss (Song Kang-ho).

title: Backyard Wilderness 3D
longDescription: The wonders of nature are viewed from the backyards of communities across the nation.
shortDescription: The wonders of nature are viewed from the backyards of communities across the nation.

title: The Big Red One
longDescription: Having previously fought in World War I, an unnamed sergeant (Lee Marvin) now leads soldiers of the U.S. First Infantry Division through World War II. His men include conflicted marksman Pvt. Griff (Mark Hamill), pulp novel writer Pvt. Zab (Robert Carradine), Sicilian Pvt. Vinci (Bobby Di Cicco) and medic Pvt. Johnson (Kelly Ward). The soldiers adapt to the hardships of war as they see conflict in North Africa and Sicily, take part in the D-Day landings, and liberate a Nazi concentration camp.
shortDescription: A World War II sergeant (Lee Marvin) turns four raw recruits into 1st Infantry sharpshooters.

title: Reminders of Him
longDescription: Desperate to rebuild her life with the daughter she's never known, Kenna finds unexpected compassion in a secret romance with local bar owner Ledger. As danger develops for both of them, Kenna hopes to find a second chance amid unbearable heartbreak.
shortDescription: A woman finds unexpected romance with a local bar owner while trying to reunite with her daughter.

title: GOAT
longDescription: A small goat named Will gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball -- a high-intensity, full-contact sport that's dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world. Ridiculed by his teammates, Will becomes determined to revolutionize the sport and prove that "small can ball!"
shortDescription: A small goat joins a full-contact sport that's dominated by the fiercest animals in the world.

title: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants
longDescription: Hoping to prove his bravery to Mr. Krabs, SpongeBob follows a mysterious, swashbuckling ghost pirate known as the Flying Dutchman on a seafaring adventure that takes him to the deepest depths of the ocean.
shortDescription: SpongeBob follows a mysterious, swashbuckling ghost pirate on a seafaring adventure.

title: Zootopia 2
longDescription: Detectives Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde find themselves on the twisting trail of a mysterious reptile who turns the mammal metropolis of Zootopia upside down. Testing their growing partnership like never before, they go undercover in new parts of town to crack the case.
shortDescription: Detectives Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde find themselves on the twisting trail of a mysterious reptile.

title: Avatar: Fire and Ash
longDescription: The conflict on Pandora escalates as Jake and Neytiri's family encounter a new, aggressive Na'vi tribe.
shortDescription: The conflict on Pandora escalates as Jake and Neytiri encounter a new, aggressive Na'vi tribe.

title: Crime 101
longDescription: A Los Angeles detective pursues an elusive thief who teams up with an insurance broker for one last heist.
shortDescription: A Los Angeles detective pursues a thief who teams up with an insurance broker for one last heist.

title: Détestable moi 2
longDescription: Ayant abandonné la super-criminalité et mis de côté ses activités funestes pour se consacrer à la paternité et élever Margo, Édith et Agnès, Gru, et avec lui, le Professeur Néfario et les Minions, doivent se trouver de nouvelles occupations. Alors qu'il commence à peine à s'adapter à sa nouvelle vie tranquille de père de famille, une organisation ultrasecrète, menant une lutte acharnée contre le mal à l'échelle planétaire, vient frapper à sa porte.
shortDescription: Un ex-vilain accepte de travailler pour une agence ultrasecrète luttant contre le Mal.

title: Super Mario Galaxy Le Film
longDescription: Mario, Luigi et la princesse Peach se lancent dans une aventure à travers la galaxie.
shortDescription: Mario, Luigi et la princesse Peach se lancent dans une aventure à travers la galaxie.

title: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come
longDescription: After surviving an all-out attack from the Le Domas family, Grace discovers she's reached the next level of the nightmarish game, and this time with her estranged sister, Faith, by her side. To survive, Grace must keep Faith alive and claim the High Seat of the Council that controls the world. Four rival families are also hunting her for the throne, and whoever wins will rule it all.
shortDescription: Four rival families hunt down Grace and her estranged sister as they vie for control of the world.

title: La momie: un film de Lee Cronin
longDescription: La fille d'un journaliste disparaît dans le désert. Huit ans plus tard, elle réapparaît soudainement, mais la joie des retrouvailles se transforme vite en cauchemar.
shortDescription: La fille d'un journaliste disparaît dans le désert. Huit ans plus tard, elle réapparaît.

title: Toi, moi et la Toscane
longDescription: Anna s'envole impulsivement pour la Toscane, en Italie, afin de séjourner sans autorisation dans la villa d'un inconnu. Surprise à l'intérieur de la maison par la mère de l'homme, elle convainc la femme qu'elle est sa fiancée. Ce petit mensonge devient rapidement un gros problème lorsque Anna commence à éprouver une attirance grandissante pour le beau cousin de l'inconnu.
shortDescription: Anna s'envole pour la Toscane, et séjourne sans autorisation dans la villa d'un inconnu.

title: Projet dernière chance
longDescription: Ryland Grace, professeur de sciences, se réveille seul à bord d'un vaisseau spatial, à des années-lumière de la Terre, sans aucun souvenir de son identité ni des raisons de sa présence à bord. Peu à peu, sa mémoire lui revient, et il comprend l'enjeu de sa mission : résoudre l'énigme de la mystérieuse substance qui cause l'extinction du Soleil. Pour tenter de sauver l'humanité, il va devoir faire appel à ses connaissances scientifiques et à des idées peu conventionnelles.
shortDescription: Un professeur de science se réveille à bord d'un vaisseau spatial, à des années-lumière de la Terre.

title: The LEGO Movie 3D
longDescription: An ordinary LEGO figurine Emmet who always follows the rules, is mistakenly identified as an extraordinary being and the key to saving the world. He finds himself drafted into a fellowship of strangers who are on a mission to stop an evil tyrant's plans to conquer the world. Unfortunately for Emmet, he is hopelessly and hilariously unprepared for such a task, but he'll give it his all nonetheless.
shortDescription: An ordinary LEGO figurine mistakenly becomes part of a quest to stop a tyrant's plan.

title: Singin' in the Rain
longDescription: A spoof of the turmoil that afflicted the movie industry in the late 1920s when movies went from silent to sound. When two silent movie stars', Don Lockwood and Lina Lamont, latest movie is made into a musical a chorus girl is brought in to dub Lina's speaking and singing. Don is on top of the world until Lina finds out.
shortDescription: A silent-film star (Gene Kelly) loves a chorus girl (Debbie Reynolds).

title: Midwinter Break
longDescription: Longtime retired couple Stella and Gerry realize that their relationship has reached a crossroads while on holiday in Amsterdam. After so much time and so many memories, long-held promises and deeply concealed wounds threaten to come to light and force them to confront their future.
shortDescription: Long-held promises and concealed wounds threaten to come to light during a couple's trip to.

title: Palestine 36
longDescription: In 1936, as Palestinian villages revolt against British colonial rule, Yusuf navigates between Jerusalem and his rural home, amidst escalating unrest and a pivotal moment for the British Empire.
shortDescription: In 1936, Yusuf navigates between Jerusalem and his rural home.

title: Plus fort que moi
longDescription: L'histoire vraie et le parcours semé d'embûches de John Davidson, un adolescent atteint du syndrome de la Tourette, une maladie encore méconnue dans les années 1980.
shortDescription: La véritable histoire de John Davidson, un adolescent atteint du syndrome de la Tourette.

title: Targets
longDescription: After unhinged Vietnam vet Bobby Thompson (Tim O'Kelly) kills his wife and mother, he goes on a brutal shooting spree. Starting at an oil refinery, he evades the police and continues his murderous outing at a drive-in movie theater, where Byron Orlock (Boris Karloff), a retiring horror film icon, is making a promotional appearance. Before long, Orlock, a symbol of fantastical old-fashioned scares, faces off against Thompson, a remorseless psychopath rooted in a harsh modern reality.
shortDescription: Horror-film star's (Boris Karloff) retirement parallels man's (Tim O'Kelly) shooting spree.

title: Spartacus
longDescription: The rebellious Thracian Spartacus, born and raised a slave, is sold to Gladiator trainer Batiatus. After weeks of being trained to kill for the arena, Spartacus turns on his owners and leads the other slaves in rebellion. As the rebels move from town to town, their numbers swell as escaped slaves join their ranks. Under the leadership of Spartacus, they make their way to southern Italy, where they will cross the sea and return to their homes.
shortDescription: A gladiator slave leads a revolt in decadent Rome and attempts to lead his followers to freedom.

title: The Wolf House
longDescription: A young woman takes refuge in a strange house in the woods after escaping from a German colony in southern Chile.
shortDescription: A young woman takes refuge in a strange house in the woods after escaping from a German colony.

title: Marc by Sofia
longDescription: Sofia Coppola captures the genius and singular universe of iconic American fashion designer Marc Jacobs.
shortDescription: Sofia Coppola captures the genius and singular universe of iconic fashion designer Marc Jacobs.

title: A New Love in Tokyo
longDescription: Ayumi, a call girl, and Rei, a seasoned dominatrix, bring viewers into their nocturnal orbit, into a life dedicated to the pursuit of pleasure, camaraderie and the joys of hanging out in the then-thriving, and perpetually horny, districts of Shinjuku and Shibuya.
shortDescription: Ayumi, a call girl, and Rei, a seasoned dominatrix, bring viewers into their nocturnal orbit.

title: La petite cuisine de Mehdi
longDescription: Mehdi est sur un fil. Il joue le rôle du fils algérien parfait devant sa mère Fatima, tout en lui cachant sa relation avec Léa ainsi que sa passion pour la gastronomie française. Il est chef dans un bistrot qu'il s'apprête à racheter avec Léa. Mais celle-ci n'en peut plus de ses cachotteries et exige de rencontrer Fatima. Au pied du mur, Mehdi va trouver la pire des solutions.
shortDescription: Mehdi est sur un fil. Il cache à sa mère sa relation ainsi que sa passion pour la gastronomie.

title: Le rêve américain
longDescription: Personne n'aurait parié sur Jérémy, coincé derrière le comptoir d'un vidéo club à Amiens, ou sur Bouna, lorsqu'il faisait des ménages à l'aéroport d'Orly. Sans argent et avec un niveau d'anglais approximatif, rien ne les prédestinait à devenir des agents qui comptent en NBA. Inspiré d'une histoire vraie, ce film raconte le parcours de deux outsiders qui, grâce à leur passion absolue pour le basket et leur amitié indéfectible, ont bravé tous les obstacles pour réaliser leur "rêve américain".
shortDescription: Rien ne prédestinait Jérémy et Bouna à devenir des agents qui comptent en NBA.

title: Dossier 137
longDescription: Un jeune homme est blessé par un tir de Flash-Ball lors des manifestations liées au mouvement des Gilets jaunes. Stéphanie, enquêtrice à l'Inspection générale de la Police nationale, est chargée d'en déterminer les responsabilités.
shortDescription: Un jeune homme est blessé par un tir de Flash-Ball lors des manifestations des Gilets jaunes.

title: Ma fille tu seras libre
longDescription: Afghanistan, printemps 2002. Forcée de se marier à un homme de 65 ans, Zarmina, 15 ans, fuit son pays pour Montréal, mais sa liberté a un prix: sa fille devra un jour épouser son cousin resté à Kaboul. Quinze ans plus tard, le pacte refait surface. Zarmina refuse le même destin pour sa fille. Sa lutte pour sa liberté se transforme en tragédie.
shortDescription: Forcée de se marier à un homme de 65 ans, Zarmina, 15 ans, fuit son pays pour Montréal.

title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie: The IMAX 2D Experience
longDescription: Mario, Luigi and Princess Peach embark on an adventure across the galaxy.
shortDescription: Mario, Luigi and Princess Peach embark on an adventure across the galaxy.

title: Licence
longDescription: A fruit vendor, denied a gun licence due to his low status, stages a fake attack with his friends to get around the system. But as the investigation deepens, it reveals a darker, deeply personal motive tied to his past.
shortDescription: A fruit vendor, denied a gun licence due to his low status, stages a fake attack with his friends.

title: Mon amour, c'est pour le restant de mes jours
Nino
longDescription: Dans trois jours, Nino devra affronter une grande épreuve. D'ici là, les médecins lui ont confié deux missions. Deux impératifs qui vont mener le jeune homme à travers Paris, le pousser à refaire corps avec les autres et avec lui-même.
shortDescription: Nino va affronter une grande épreuve. Les médecins lui ont confié deux missions.

title: L'inconnu de la Grande Arche
longDescription: 1982. François Mitterrand lance un concours d'architecture anonyme sans précédent pour la construction d'un édifice emblématique dans l'axe du Louvre et de l'Arc de Triomphe. À la surprise générale, c'est Johan Otto von Spreckelsen, un architecte danois de 53 ans, qui l'emporte. Il est alors propulsé à la tête du plus grand chantier de l'époque. Et s'il entend bâtir sa Grande Arche telle qu'il l'a imaginée, ses idées vont très vite se heurter à la complexité du réel et aux aléas de la politique.
shortDescription: 1982. Un architecte danois remporte un concours visant à la construction d'un édifice emblématique.

title: Sirat
longDescription: Un hombre y su hijo llegan a una rave perdida en medio de las montañas del sur de Marruecos. Buscan a Mar, su hija y hermana, desaparecida hace meses en una de esas fiestas sin amanecer.
shortDescription: Un hombre y su hijo llegan a una rave perdida en medio de las montañas del sur de Marruecos.

title: Prêt pas prêt 2: j'arrive
longDescription: Après avoir survécu à un match mortel, Grace et sa sœur Faith doivent maintenant déjouer quatre familles rivales qui se disputent un trône puissant. La gagnante remporte tout.
shortDescription: Après avoir survécu à un match mortel, Grace et Faith doivent déjouer quatre familles rivales.

title: Frissons 7
longDescription: Lorsqu'un nouveau Ghostface surgit dans la paisible ville où Sidney Prescott a reconstruit sa vie, ses pires cauchemars refont surface. Quand sa fille devient la prochaine cible, Sidney n'a d'autre choix que de reprendre le combat. Déterminée à protéger les siens, elle devra affronter les démons de son passé pour tenter de mettre fin une bonne fois pour toutes au bain de sang.
shortDescription: Un nouveau Ghostface surgit dans la paisible ville où Sidney Prescott a reconstruit sa vie.

title: Sauteurs
longDescription: Mabel, une adolescente passionnée par les animaux, saute sur l'occasion d'essayer une nouvelle technologie révolutionnaire permettant de communiquer avec eux d'une manière totalement inédite en se glissant dans la peau d'une adorable femelle castor. Conçu par des scientifiques visionnaires, ce dispositif permet de transférer la conscience humaine dans le corps de robots-animaux plus vrais que nature. Mabel se lance alors dans une aventure unique et riche en découvertes au coeur du règne animal.
shortDescription: Mabel essaye une nouvelle technologie permettant de communiquer avec les animaux.

title: L'affaire Bojarski
longDescription: Jan Bojarski, un jeune ingénieur polonais, se réfugie en France pendant la guerre. Il y utilise ses dons pour fabriquer des faux papiers pendant l'occupation allemande. Après la guerre, son absence d'état civil l'empêche de déposer les brevets de ses nombreuses inventions et il est limité à des petits boulots mal rémunérés... jusqu'au jour où un gangster lui propose d'utiliser ses talents exceptionnels pour fabriquer des faux billets.
shortDescription: Jan Bojarski, un jeune ingénieur polonais, se réfugie en France pendant la guerre.

title: Goat - rêver plus haut
longDescription: Will est un petit bouc avec de grands rêves. Lorsqu'il décroche une chance inespérée de rejoindre la ligue professionnelle de roarball, un sport ultra-intense réservé aux bêtes les plus rapides et féroces, il entend bien saisir l'opportunité. Problème : ses nouveaux coéquipiers ne sont pas vraiment ravis d'avoir un petit dans l'équipe. Mais Will est prêt à tout pour changer les règles du jeu.
shortDescription: Will est un petit bouc. Il décroche une chance de rejoindre la ligue de roarball.

title: Cap Farewell
longDescription: Toni, une jeune femme de 24 ans, sort de prison et doit retourner vivre chez sa mère Betty. Déterminée à renouer avec sa fille Anna, elle travaille dans la brasserie de son oncle. De nouveau, elle se retrouve impliquée dans les affaires de contrebande de son amour d'enfance, Max, le père d'Anna. Toni devra faire preuve de combativité pour se libérer de cet environnement toxique.
shortDescription: Toni, une jeune femme de 24 ans, sort de prison et doit retourner vivre chez sa mère Betty.

title: Vie privée
longDescription: Lilian Steiner est une psychiatre reconnue. Quand elle apprend la mort de l'une de ses patientes, elle se persuade qu'il s'agit d'un meurtre. Troublée, elle décide de mener son enquête.
shortDescription: Quand elle apprend la mort de sa patiente, une psychiatre pense qu'il s'agit d'un meurtre.

title: Sacré Coeur: Son règne n'a pas de fin
longDescription: Il y a 350 ans, en France, Jésus a fait connaître son cœur brûlant d'amour à Sainte Marguerite-Marie. Aujourd'hui, dans le monde entier, la puissance du Sacré-Cœur transforme encore des vies. Un docu-fiction saisissant qui nous plonge au cours des siècles dans le mystère du Sacré-Cœur de Jésus et nous révèle son amour personnel et inconditionnel.
shortDescription: Un docu-fiction qui nous plonge au cours des siècles dans le mystère du Sacré-Cœur de Jésus.

title: Souvenirs de lui
longDescription: Après une sortie parfaite avec son petit ami, Kenna commet une erreur irréparable qui la conduit en prison pour sept ans. Espérant reconstruire sa vie après sa libération, elle tente de retrouver sa fille, mais ses grands-parents, qui en ont la garde, refusent de la laisser la voir. Elle trouve bientôt une compassion inattendue auprès du propriétaire d'un bar local, et leur romance secrète donne à Kenna l'espoir d'une seconde chance.
shortDescription: Kenna tente de retrouver sa fille, mais ses grands-parents refusent de la laisser la voir.

title: TÀI
longDescription: Với quyết tâm hoàn lương sau khi mãn hạn tù, Tài trở về miền Tây làm lại từ đầu, mưu sinh bằng mọi nghề nhằm trang trải cuộc sống. Vì món nợ chồng chất, bà Phúc khiến Tài rơi vào hiểm nguy và buộc phải đối đầu với những thế lực tội phạm để bảo vệ mẹ.
shortDescription: Một người đàn ông nỗ lực hoàn lương nhưng buộc phải đối đầu với những thế lực tội phạm nguy hiểm.

title: Blue Road: The Edna O'Brien Story
longDescription: A 93-year-old Irish writer Edna O'Brien recounts her controversial life, novels, love affairs, and stardom through personal journals.
shortDescription: A 93-year-old Irish writer Edna O'Brien recounts her controversial life.

title: Two Strangers Trying Not to Kill Each Other
longDescription: Married artists Joel and Maggie share a loving bond, but Maggie feels overshadowed. This brave film explores their extraordinary confrontations as they navigate love, aging, and the creative process.
shortDescription: Exploring Joel and Maggie's confrontations as they navigate love, aging, and the creative process.

title: The Damned
longDescription: A steel-magnate baroness (Ingrid Thulin), her lover (Dirk Bogarde) and her son (Helmut Berger) embody Nazi depravity.
shortDescription: Baroness (Ingrid Thulin), lover (Dirk Bogarde) and son (Helmut Berger) embody Nazi depravity.

title: Holy Days
longDescription: Accompanied by a young boy, three unconventional nuns embark on a wild and chaotic road trip across New Zealand to retrieve the deeds to their convent. When an unexpected snowstorm derails their journey, they soon find themselves confronting loss, mortality and the transformative power of love, forgiveness and connection.
shortDescription: Three unconventional nuns and a young boy embark on a wild and chaotic road trip across New Zealand.

title: The Bearded Girl
longDescription: The story of a bearded girl who is tired of being a freak.
shortDescription: The story of a bearded girl who is tired of being a freak.

title: Butterfly Journey
longDescription: Beautiful, delicate yet unbelievably resilient, the butterfly is one of nature's most enigmatic creatures. A story of adaptation and survival, we follow the vast migrations of the Blue Tigers of Australia and the Monarchs of North America and Mexico.
shortDescription: Delicate yet unbelievably resilient, the butterfly is one of nature's most enigmatic creatures.

title: Asteroid Hunters
longDescription: Filmmaker W.D. Hogan examines how scientists use cutting-edge tools and techniques to detect and track asteroids.
shortDescription: Scientists use cutting-edge tools and techniques to detect and track asteroids.

title: Deep Sky
longDescription: NASA builds the revolutionary James Webb Space Telescope to study cosmic landscapes in stunning resolution.
shortDescription: NASA builds the revolutionary James Webb Space Telescope to study cosmic landscapes.

title: Shark Kingdom 3D
longDescription: An epic family adventure revealing how the ocean's top predator uses hidden super senses to be a key player in the marine ecosystem.
shortDescription: An adventure revealing how the ocean's top predator uses hidden super senses.

title: EPiC: Elvis Presley in Concert
longDescription: Never-before-seen footage and recordings feature Elvis Presley in concert at his Las Vegas residency during the later stage of his career.
shortDescription: Never-before-seen footage features Elvis Presley in concert at his Las Vegas residency.

title: Fight Club
longDescription: A depressed man suffering from insomnia meets a strange soap salesman named Tyler Durden and soon finds himself living in his squalid house after his perfect apartment is destroyed. The two bored men form an underground club with strict rules and fight other men who are fed up with their mundane lives. Their perfect partnership frays when Marla, a fellow support group crasher, attracts Tyler's attention.
shortDescription: Two men (Brad Pitt, Edward Norton) create an underground boxing club.

title: Hamlet
longDescription: A man seeks revenge against his uncle for murdering his father in a modern-day retelling of Shakespeare's "Hamlet."
shortDescription: A man seeks revenge against his uncle for killing his father in a modern-day retelling of "Hamlet."

title: Backyard Wilderness
longDescription: The wonders of nature are viewed from the backyards of communities across the nation.
shortDescription: The wonders of nature are viewed from the backyards of communities across the nation.

theatre.name: HD Digital Dome Theatre at Telus Spark
HD Digital Dome Theatre at Telus Spark

title: The Story of Earth
longDescription: Contemporary geology helps experts form a new understanding of how life on Earth came to be.
shortDescription: Contemporary geology helps experts form a new understanding of how life on Earth came to be.

theatre.name: HD Digital Dome Theatre at Telus Spark

title: Bee Movie
longDescription: Fresh out of college, Barry the Bee finds the prospect of working with honey uninspiring. He flies outside the hive for the first time and talks to a human, breaking a cardinal rule of his species. Barry learns that humans have been stealing and eating honey for centuries, and he realizes that his true calling is to obtain justice for his kind by suing humanity for theft.
shortDescription: A college-educated bee intends to sue the human race for stealing honey.

title: Fiume o morte!
longDescription: Early-20th-century Italian warrior-poet Gabriele D'Annunzio. A model for Mussolini who ruled Rijeka, Croatia, with an iron fist, D'Annunzio's 16-month reign left such a legacy that current denizens (street-cast in a brilliant montage) are more than a little willing to play-act as his soldiers.
shortDescription: A model for Mussolini who ruled Rijeka, Croatia, with an iron fist.

title: Dead Lover
longDescription: A lonely gravedigger who stinks of corpses finally meets her dream man, but their whirlwind affair is cut short when he tragically drowns at sea. Grief-stricken, she goes to morbid lengths to resurrect him through madcap scientific experiments, resulting in grave consequences and unlikely love.
shortDescription: A lonely gravedigger who stinks of corpses finally meets her dream man.

title: Rocky Mountain Express
longDescription: A history of the nation's first transcontinental railway accompanies a steam-train ride through the Canadian Rockies.
shortDescription: A trip through the Canadian Rockies shows a history of the nation's first transcontinental railway.

title: Blue Whales: Return of the Giants
longDescription: Scientists embark on oceanic expeditions to study blue whales.
shortDescription: Scientists embark on oceanic expeditions to study blue whales.

title: The Shining: The IMAX 2D Experience
longDescription: Jack Torrance (Jack Nicholson) becomes winter caretaker at the isolated Overlook Hotel in Colorado, hoping to cure his writer's block. He settles in along with his wife, Wendy (Shelley Duvall), and his son, Danny (Danny Lloyd), who is plagued by psychic premonitions. As Jack's writing goes nowhere and Danny's visions become more disturbing, Jack discovers the hotel's dark secrets and begins to unravel into a homicidal maniac hell-bent on terrorizing his family.
shortDescription: A writer goes mad while serving as caretaker with his wife and clairvoyant son.

title: Eraserheads: Combo on the Run
longDescription: When the Eraserheads formed in 1989, their music swept the country. But the real story behind the group remains untold.
shortDescription: When the Eraserheads formed in 1989, their music swept the country.

title: Astro Boy
longDescription: In futuristic Metro City, a brilliant scientist named Tenma builds Astro Boy, a robotic child with superstrength, X-ray vision and the ability to fly. Astro Boy sets out to explore the world and find acceptance, learning what being human is all about in the process. Finding that his friends and family in Metro City are in danger, he uses his incredible powers to save all that he loves.
shortDescription: A robotic child (Freddie Highmore) must use his superpowers to save his city from destruction.

theatre.name: Regina Public Library Film Theatre at Central Library

title: Pillion
longDescription: A timid man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic, impossibly handsome biker takes him on as his submissive.
shortDescription: A timid man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic, handsome biker takes him on as his submissive.

theatre.name: Regina Public Library Film Theatre at Central Library

title: Lost Wolves of Yellowstone
longDescription: The pioneering work of scientists and conservationists who fought to restore balance to one of the country's most iconic ecosystems, and offers a powerful look at the complex relationship between humans and the wild.
shortDescription: The pioneering work of scientists and conservationists who fought to restore balance.

title: The Pout-Pout Fish
longDescription: Two aquatic misfits embark on an impossible journey to save their home.
shortDescription: Two aquatic misfits embark on an impossible journey to save their home.

title: I Can
longDescription: Born with one fully developed arm, a girl defies the odds to become a gifted softball player, while her father finds genuine forgiveness.
shortDescription: Born with one fully developed arm, a girl defies the odds to become a gifted softball player.

title: Send Help
longDescription: A woman and her overbearing boss become stranded on a deserted island after a plane crash. They must overcome past grievances and work together to survive, but ultimately, it's a battle of wills and wits to make it out alive.
shortDescription: A woman turns the tables on her mean boss after a plane crash leaves them stranded on an island.

title: Scream 7
longDescription: When a new Ghostface killer emerges in the quiet town where Sidney has built a new life, her darkest fears are realized as her daughter becomes the next target. Determined to protect her family, she must face the horrors of her past to put an end to the bloodshed once and for all.
shortDescription: Sidney must face the horrors of the past when a new Ghostface killer targets her daughter.

title: Lydia and the Mist Rider
longDescription: When her older brother Thaddeus is mysteriously kidnapped by the Spellbinder, 11-year-old Lydia sets off to find him in the Misty Sea. Picked up by the crew of a flying ship, the Dolphin, Lydia becomes the apprentice of Ambrosia, a Stargazer. Ambrosia is trying to find other children who have disappeared, including her own son. Determined to solve the mystery, Lydia must learn astromagic and ready herself to confront the Spellbinder.
shortDescription: When her brother Thaddeus is kidnapped by the Spellbinder, 11-year-old Lydia sets off to find him.

title: Agatha's Almanac
longDescription: 90-year-old Agatha Bock maintains her ancestral farm and heirloom seeds without modern amenities, preserving a fading traditional way of life through her daily routines.
shortDescription: Agatha Bock maintains her ancestral farm and heirloom seeds without modern amenities.
